required_skills: Venture capital deal sourcing and pipeline management
Startup due diligence — market, product, team, and competitive evaluation
Financial modeling including DCF, comparable company analysis, and venture return modeling
Market sizing and TAM/SAM/SOM analysis for emerging technology sectors
Investment memo writing and structured synthesis of qualitative and quantitative findings
Startup ecosystem mapping and emerging technology trend research
Capitalization table (cap table) analysis and term sheet interpretation
Quantitative data analysis and screening of deal flow pipelines
preferred_skills: Prior internship or full-time experience at a VC fund, accelerator, or angel network
Deep domain expertise in a high-conviction sector such as AI/ML, fintech, climate tech, or B2B SaaS
Experience building or operating a startup, even at an early or informal stage
Familiarity with LP reporting, fund economics, and portfolio monitoring workflows
Strong existing network within the founder or investor community
Understanding of secondary markets and alternative liquidity mechanisms for private equity
Exposure to international startup ecosystems and cross-border investment considerations
responsibilities: Source high-potential startup investment opportunities through founder networks, accelerator demo days, ecosystem events, and inbound deal flow channels
Conduct comprehensive due diligence on prospective portfolio companies, evaluating market opportunity, product differentiation, founding team quality, and competitive dynamics
Build detailed financial models including revenue projections, unit economics stress tests, and venture return scenarios to support investment committee decisions
Draft structured investment memos that synthesize market research, due diligence findings, and thesis alignment into a clear recommendation for the investment committee
Perform market sizing analyses and competitive landscape mappings for priority investment verticals, informing the fund's thematic investment thesis
Maintain and continuously enrich the deal flow CRM in Affinity, ensuring all pipeline companies, interactions, and due diligence stages are accurately tracked
Monitor portfolio company performance by tracking key metrics, participating in board observer calls, and preparing quarterly portfolio update reports for GPs and LPs
Analyze cap tables, term sheets, and liquidation preference stacks to assess founder dilution, investor rights, and return implications across funding scenarios
Represent the fund at founder events, pitch competitions, and accelerator demo days to build relationships and expand the firm's deal sourcing network
Research emerging technology trends and publish internal theses or external thought leadership content to strengthen the fund's brand within the startup ecosystem
